data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Last processed event checkpoint', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or details regarding this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for a last processed event checkpoint, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks presented in the prior step evidence that confirm its existence or functionality. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to validate the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the last processed event checkpoint being validated or checked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
